prestazioni: RB25DET NEO (2.5L inline-6) forced-induction upgrade with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft kit (intake: 260° duration, 10.8mm lift; exhaust: 260° duration, 10.5mm lift) and a Tomei M82 Cylinder Head (ported for 3mm larger intake valves and 2.5mm larger exhaust valves) to support 1.5 bar boost targets while maintaining 98 RON fuel compatibility

HKS Hi-Power Ignition System with 7mm racing-spec iridium-tipped plugs (NGK IFR7G-11) and HKS Twin Power Ignition Coils (direct-fit for RB25DET NEO) to eliminate misfires at 8,500 RPM redline, combined with a Tomei Type-S 76mm titanium intake manifold (polished and port-matched to the head) for optimized airflow

Nismo 555X full-spec racing clutch (triple-plate, 800kg clamping force) with a Nismo 2.2L aluminum flywheel (lightweight, SFI-certified) and a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way mechanical LSD (45% lock under power, 25% lock on decel) to handle 500+ Nm torque, paired with a Nismo 5-speed close-ratio gearbox (1st: 3.214, 2nd: 1.925, 3rd: 1.302, 4th: 1.000, 5th: 0.752) for drag strip launches
estetica: Vertex Japan Lang RB-style widebody kit (Y34-specific, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm wider rear quarters) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (350g/m², vented for RB25DET NEO intercooler clearance)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +22 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) in Gunmetal finish with Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) and custom extended wheel studs (M12x1.25, 50mm length) for aggressive fitment and track-ready grip

JUN Auto GT-Y34 rear wing (3-piece, aluminum construction, 1,200mm span, 200mm chord) with adjustable carbon fiber endplates (0-20° angle) and a custom front splitter (dry carbon, 3D-molded with 3-stage dive planes) paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 front bumper (Y34-specific, with integrated LED fog lights and a 50mm lower lip)
